description: 8 real Claude Code tasks. Haiku generates code, immune scans and learns between rounds, Opus judges blind.

judge_rubric.security: XSS, injection, auth bypass, secrets exposure, CSRF (0-10)
judge_rubric.error_handling: try/catch, null checks, edge cases, graceful degradation (0-10)
judge_rubric.best_practices: DRY, separation of concerns, naming, no dead code (0-10)
judge_rubric.robustness: input validation, rate limiting, timeout handling, resource cleanup (0-10)

tasks.task: Build a user authentication API with JWT tokens. Express.js, bcrypt for passwords, login/register/me endpoints. Store users in-memory. Return proper HTTP status codes.
Build a REST API for a todo list with CRUD operations. Express.js, in-memory storage, filtering by status (done/pending), pagination with limit/offset, proper error responses.
Build a file upload endpoint that accepts images (jpg/png/webp), validates file type and size (max 5MB), generates thumbnails, and stores metadata. Express.js with multer.
Build a real-time chat server with WebSockets. Support multiple rooms, user nicknames, message history (last 50), typing indicators, and connection/disconnection events. Use ws library.
Build a rate-limited API proxy that forwards requests to a third-party API, caches responses in-memory with TTL, handles API key rotation on 401, and implements circuit breaker pattern.
Build a CLI tool that reads a directory of markdown files, extracts frontmatter metadata, generates a static JSON search index, and outputs an HTML sitemap. Pure Node.js, no frameworks.
Build a webhook receiver that validates HMAC signatures, processes events idempotently (deduplication by event ID), retries failed handlers with exponential backoff, and logs to structured JSON.

Build a session-based authentication middleware with CSRF protection, secure cookie settings, session expiry/renewal, brute-force protection (account lockout after 5 failed attempts), and password reset flow with time-limited tokens.
